content:
### 🔀 ALT NAME CLUSTER: SYSTEM AS CODE, ORGANISM, OR GOD

| Name | Meaning |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| OS:MYTH | Operating system for mythic recursion |
| R!TUAL | A programmable ritual system |
| RE:GEN | Recursive Generator, also Regeneration |
| 4RCH | “Arch” as structure + "4" as symbolic core |
| R!4L | Real + Ritual + Recursive + 4-based identity (like ETCETER4) |
| MYTH0MACHINE | Myth + Automaton |
| REFLUX | Like reflux of memory/emotion/looping (emotional recursion as wave) |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 131 (chunk 131/206)
